query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_nba, SUM(CASE WHEN awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_model_spread, SUM(CASE WHEN modelTotal IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_model_total, SUM(CASE WHEN modelAwayML IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_model_ml FROM games WHERE sport = 'NBA';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_nba, SUM(CASE WHEN awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_model_spread, SUM(CASE WHEN modelTotal IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_model_total, SUM(CASE WHEN modelAwayML IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_model_ml FROM games WHERE sport = 'NBA';
